changelogs:
Updated to 2.1.3

Roblox Bootstrapper
- Added support for `roblox://` protocol
- In the Protocol tab, re-register protocols if you installed a version below 2.1.3 before
- Fixed version detection for RblxSwap
- Weblauncher will now automatically redownload deployments if they were deleted

Studio Bootstrapper (NEW)
- Added support for Roblox Studio (can be enabled after enabling Roblox Bootstrapper)
- Added support for `roblox-studio://`, `roblox-studio-auth://`, and `.rbxl / .rbxlx` files
- Added a Launch Studio button in the app when enabled

Advanced
- Added toggles to create Launch Roblox and Launch Studio desktop shortcuts

Find bugs? Report them in #media
Valid bug reports will be rewarded
